requirement: Only the LBNL/DOE U.S. paragraph may move CH16Q IDs out of inline prose in the first layout test.
pass_condition: The candidate layout moves only CH16Q-003, CH16Q-004, CH16Q-005, and CH16Q-006 into N16-1.
fail_condition: Any other CH16Q ID is removed from inline prose before a later explicit acceptance row exists.
next_layout_action: Use N16-1 as the only first-page note-move candidate.

requirement: N16-1 must preserve the measured 2023 U.S. TWh row separately from scenario rows.
pass_condition: The note states CH16Q-003 as the reported/about 176 TWh 2023 estimate and keeps LBNL/DOE attribution.
fail_condition: The note collapses CH16Q-003 into generic LBNL/DOE data, omits the year, or makes it look like a forecast.
next_layout_action: Keep "reported" or "about" in prose or note.

requirement: N16-1 must preserve the 2028 TWh range as modeled scenario language.
pass_condition: The note states CH16Q-004 as the modeled 325-580 TWh 2028 scenario range.
fail_condition: The note gives a midpoint, drops the range, drops 2028, or removes modeled/scenario wording.

requirement: N16-1 must preserve the measured 2023 U.S. electricity-share row separately from projected share.
pass_condition: The note states CH16Q-005 as the reported/about 4.4 percent 2023 U.S. electricity-use share.
fail_condition: The note merges the share with 2028 projections or implies 4.4 percent is a global number.

requirement: N16-1 must preserve the 2028 percentage range as projected/scenario language.
pass_condition: The note states CH16Q-006 as the projected possible 6.7 to 12 percent 2028 scenario share.
fail_condition: The note collapses the range, states it as certainty, drops 2028, or omits projected/scenario wording.

requirement: The N16-1 note must be close enough that the reader can inspect it without leaving the paragraph.
pass_condition: The note appears as a same-page sidenote, footnote, or immediately following note block in a mock page.
fail_condition: The note is pushed to a distant endnote, appendix, or source list where measured/scenario mapping is not visible during reading.
next_layout_action: Reject note move in PDF/layout if proximity fails.

requirement: CH16Q-017 must remain inline where NVIDIA/GTC "AI factory" company framing appears.
pass_condition: The sentence with AI factory/company argument still contains CH16Q-017 inline; a sidenote may duplicate it but not replace it.
fail_condition: CH16Q-017 moves only to N16-1, a broad note, an endnote, or a source list.
next_layout_action: Any layout that removes inline CH16Q-017 fails.

requirement: CH16Q-018 must remain inline where the energy-per-token exclusion appears.
pass_condition: The sentence saying the stack is not a quantified energy-per-token model still contains CH16Q-018 inline; a sidenote may duplicate it but not replace it.
fail_condition: CH16Q-018 moves only to a note or disappears from the exclusion sentence.
next_layout_action: Any layout that removes inline CH16Q-018 fails.

requirement: Operator-survey rows may not move during the N16-1 test.
pass_condition: CH16Q-015 and CH16Q-016 stay inline in the Uptime paragraph.
fail_condition: They are moved to a note that does not label them operator-survey signals.
next_layout_action: Defer operator-note testing until after N16-1 passes visually.

requirement: The note-layout pass may not introduce any new exact quantity, forecast, PUE, rack-density, Wh/token, or NVIDIA/GTC performance claim.
pass_condition: Every exact quantitative or blocked/exclusion claim in the mock maps to an existing CH16Q row.
fail_condition: A new exact number or company-performance claim appears without a successor audit row.
next_layout_action: Reject mock and create a successor audit row before prose/layout expansion.

requirement: The note move must improve reading without weakening truth controls.
pass_condition: The LBNL/DOE paragraph loses dense inline clusters while N16-1 preserves four row mappings and scenario labels.
fail_condition: The note is longer than the clutter it replaces, confuses mappings, or invites one-number summary prose.
next_layout_action: Proceed to I-0063 mock only if this is plausible in the page design.

requirement: The live manuscript should not move CH16Q IDs until a rendered or mocked page passes this checklist.
pass_condition: manuscript/16-speed-to-power.md remains unchanged after checklist creation.
fail_condition: The checklist pass edits live prose to remove row IDs before visual acceptance evidence exists.
next_layout_action: Use the checklist as the gate for I-0063, not as a prose merge.
